title: MapConfig
description: Single ROI+HSV-based detection config emitted by apps/tooling and consumed by apps/mobile. One unified shape (no v1/v2 schema branches): the runtime selects the matching `map_config.<hud_version>.json` once per session via `hud_version_detection`, and `score_screen_duration_ms` drives the timing-derived score-screen extraction window after `in_match` ends. `in_match_detection` is the single game-state classifier (binary in-match-or-not — score-screen is timing-derived, lobby/transition are merged into `not_in_match`). `schema_version` is the config-shape version (NOT the detection-method version, NOT the HUD version) and stays at 1 until a future migration story bumps the layout.

schema_version.description: Config-shape version. Forward-evolution slot: future schema changes bump to enum [1, 2, ...] under a migration story.

reference_resolution.description: Source video resolution the zone coordinates are calibrated against.

hud_version.description: HUD generation this config is calibrated for. Runtime picks the matching `map_config.<hud_version>.json` once per session via `hud_version_detection`. New HUD versions extend this enum (flag during Story 1.13's bundling work).

score_screen_duration_ms.description: Timing offset (ms) for score-screen extraction after the `in_match` falling edge. Per-HUD-version constant; lives in the schema because it is a config-time tuning knob, not a runtime decision.

hud_version_detection.description: Zones that classify HUD generation. Evaluated once per session at runtime to pick which bundled `map_config.<hud_version>.json` applies. Empty arrays are allowed (a partially-staged HUD version) — the runtime classifier short-circuits to `unknown` in that case.

in_match_detection.description: Zones that classify the binary `in_match`/`not_in_match` state. Score-screen is timing-derived (NOT a separate class). Lobby and transition are merged into `not_in_match`. Empty arrays are allowed.

minimap_identification.description: Per-map fingerprint config. The minimap ROI is shared across all maps; each map slug carries its own zone list (empty allowed for not-yet-fingerprinted maps).

id.description: Identifier of the calibration profile this config carries. Today only 'test' exists; left configurable for future per-profile A/B variations.

identification_threshold.description: Minimum aggregate match score (sum of per-zone fires x weight) above which a map is considered identified.

maps.description: Map slug -> per-map detector entry. Slugs are lowercased ASCII (e.g. 'the_cliff'). Iteration order is preserved from the fragment file (Python 3.7+ dict insertion order); `zone_picker` (Story 9.12) is responsible for stable ordering — `map_config_emitter` does NOT sort.

Rect.description: Named axis-aligned rectangle in pixel coordinates (top-left origin) at reference_resolution.

Hsv.description: User-space HSV band center + per-channel tolerance. H in [0,360]; H tolerance in [0,180] (half-circle max); S/V in [0,100]. NOT OpenCV-space (H 0-180, S/V 0-255).

Zone.description: Per-zone detector cell. Coordinates are at reference_resolution. `weight` is the zone's contribution to the aggregate match score; `weight_override` is `null` to use `weight` as-is, or a number to replace the aggregate weight contribution (behavioral change from the pre-9.9c boolean shape; pre-9.9c true/false mapped to a presence flag, not an override value).

MapEntry.description: Per-map fingerprint entry. Empty `zones: []` is allowed for maps that have not been fingerprinted yet.
